zh.lifeSummary: 當William Livingstone of Salcoats於1397年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾培斯時，他的父親Robert Livingston17歲，母親Margaret Somerville12歲。他於1428年11月19日與Euphemia de Wemyss在蘇格蘭費伏維梅斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1465年11月19日在英國蘇格蘭費伏維梅斯享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Livingstone of Salcoats于1397年出生在英国苏格兰培爾培斯时，他的父亲Robert Livingston17岁，母亲Margaret Somerville12岁。他于1428年11月19日与Euphemia de Wemyss在苏格兰費伏維梅斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1465年11月19日在英国苏格兰費伏維梅斯享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Livingstone
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Livingston
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Lothian, originally named in Middle English as Levingston. The placename derives from the Middle English personal name Leving (genitive Levinges) + Middle English, Older Scots toun ‘town, village, settlement’.
Irish: surname adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Ó Duinnshléibhe and Mac Duinnshléibhe (see Dunleavy ).

variants.name: Levingston
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Livingstone  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Livingstone of Salcoats was born in 1397, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Livingston, was 17 and his mother, Margaret Somerville, was 12. He married Euphemia de Wemyss on 19 November 1428, in Wemyss, Fife, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 19 November 1465, in Wemyss, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Livingstone of Salcoats est né en 1397, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Livingston, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Margaret Somerville, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Euphemia de Wemyss le 19 novembre 1428, à Wemyss, Fife, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 19 novembre 1465, à Wemyss, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Livingstone of Salcoats 1397 in Perth, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Livingston 17 und seine Mutter Margaret Somerville 12. Er hat am 19. November 1428 in Wemyss, Fife, Scotland Euphemia de Wemyss geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 19. November 1465 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Wemyss, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom.

Lui sposato Euphemia de Wemyss il 19 novembre 1428, nel Wemyss, Fife, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: William Livingstone of Salcoatsが1397年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスで生まれた時，父Robert Livingstonは17歳，母Margaret Somervilleは12歳であった。1428年11月19日にスコットランドフィフウエムイスでEuphemia de Wemyssと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1465年11月19日にイギリススコットランドフィフウエムイスで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Livingstone of Salcoats(이)가 1397년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Livingston(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Somerville(은)는 12세였다. 그는 1428년 11월 19일 스컷랜드 피프 베미스에서 Euphemia de Wemyss(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1465년 11월 19일 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 베미스에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Livingstone of Salcoats родился в 1397 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Livingston было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Somerville, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Euphemia de Wemyss 19 ноября 1428 г. в местности вемисс, фиф, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 19 ноября 1465 г. в местности вемисс, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет.
